findings.evidence: Measured 3 items from refrigerated delivery: 3.1°C, 3.8°C, 2.9°C — all within limit
COAs present for all 4 high-risk item categories received today
All packaging intact; 2 damaged cartons rejected and returned to supplier
Walk-in cooler #1: 3.2°C, Walk-in cooler #2: 3.8°C — both within limit
Freezer unit: -20.1°C — within limit
FIFO mostly practiced; found 3 cases of chicken breast with older date behind newer stock on shelf C2
findings.notes: Not a food safety hazard but rotation discipline should be reinforced with receiving staff

findings.evidence: HACCP-02 log reviewed: gap of 7.5 hours in temperature recording between 2:00 AM and 9:30 AM entries — exceeds 4-hour maximum requirement
findings.notes: Morning shift supervisor could not explain the gap; equipment datalogger confirms temperature stayed within range during this period, but documentation is non-conforming

findings.evidence: All dry goods on shelving minimum 20cm off floor; no floor storage observed
Chemicals in locked chemical storage room, separate from food storage area
No evidence of pest activity; pest control service log current (last visit 2026-03-20)
All 3 handwashing sinks: soap present, paper towels stocked, warm water operational
Staff observed using color-coded boards correctly; red boards for raw poultry, green for vegetables
Sanitizer test: 150 ppm — below the 200 ppm requirement. Solution appeared diluted. Concentration strip test repeated twice with same result.
findings.notes: Sanitizer bucket had not been refreshed since start of shift (4+ hours). Staff were unaware of refreshing requirement.

findings.evidence: HACCP-01 log shows all 8 poultry batches reached ≥73.9°C. Spot check of current batch: 76.2°C
8 log entries match 8 batch records for today's production
Calibration log current; thermometer #1 calibrated 2026-03-22, thermometer #2 calibrated 2026-03-21 — both within 7-day window
HACCP-03 log: 3 batches cooled today. Batch 1: 60°C→21°C in 1h45m (pass), 21°C→4°C in 3h20m (pass). All within limits.
Blast chiller display: -22°C during operation. Unit functional.
HACCP-04 log: 14 test entries for today's 7-hour run. Fe 2mm, Non-Fe 2.5mm, SS 3mm all detected correctly on each test.
5 label samples checked. 4 correct. 1 label missing 'Contains: SOY' allergen statement — however this was from a test run label, not in production use. Production labels are correct.
findings.notes: Recommend removing test labels from production area to prevent accidental use

findings.evidence: Tree nut-containing product run completed at 6 AM; allergen changeover cleaning performed and verified. No simultaneous allergen lines running.
Measured 6 outbound cases: 2.8°C, 3.1°C, 3.4°C, 2.9°C, 3.0°C, 3.3°C — all within limit
Transport vehicle pre-cooled to 2.1°C before loading commenced
